How it works

From "I need..." to found
in 10 seconds.

No app download. No account creation. No stress. Just open Telegram or WhatsApp, say what you need, and Konnet Hub does the rest.

01

Open Your Preferred App

Search @Konnet_Bot on Telegram or message +234 810 417 5328 on WhatsApp. Available on both — use whichever you prefer.

02

Describe What You Need

"Konnet me to a welder in Aba" — plain English, any service, any of Nigeria's 774 LGAs. The AI understands context, not just keywords.

03

Get Verified Results

Receive a curated list of businesses near you — complete with name, address, phone number, and ratings from real customers.

04

Connect Directly

Call or WhatsApp the business yourself. No middlemen, no commissions, no friction. The connection is entirely yours to manage.

Platform Features

Built for how
Nigeria actually works.

AI-Powered Search

Natural language search
that actually understands you.

No dropdowns, no filters, no forms. Just describe what you need and where you are — in plain English, Pidgin, or however you naturally speak. Our AI parses context, intent, and location to surface the most relevant results every time.

For Business Owners

Your next customer
is already searching.

Stop being invisible. Get your business on Konnet Hub and start appearing in front of customers actively looking for exactly what you offer.

Free Tier

Listed

Free / 7 days
  • Get into our database and appear in searches
  • Full business profile — name, services, location, contact
  • Customers reach you directly — zero commission
  • Visible within your LGA only
  • Renew manually every 7 days to stay listed
  • Good for getting started — upgrade anytime
Telegram WhatsApp
Verified

Verified Business

₦5,000 / month
  • Verified badge — customers trust you more instantly
  • Appear above all free listings in every search
  • Automatic monthly renewal reminders — no manual renewals
  • Customer reviews and star ratings displayed
  • Active in your state and neighbouring states
Telegram WhatsApp
Highest Visibility

Konnet Pro

₦10,000 / month
  • Appear FIRST in every relevant search — above everyone
  • Gold Konnet Pro badge — signals serious business commitment
  • Visible across all 36 states — maximum reach nationwide
  • Maximum reach — customers find you before competitors
  • Everything included in Verified Business

Add-on

Business Insights

Add-on — available to any tier including free

  • Weekly report every Monday — how often your service is searched

FAQ

Common questions.

On Telegram: search @Konnet_Bot and tap Start. On WhatsApp: message +234 810 417 5328. Then just describe what you need — "Konnet me to a mechanic in Lekki" — and you'll get results in seconds. No account, no form, no download required.
Yes — completely free for anyone searching for a business or service. There are no hidden charges, no subscriptions, and no registration required for people looking for services. Search as many times as you want, across any category, any location in Nigeria.
On Telegram: open @Konnet_Bot and type /register. On WhatsApp: message +234 810 417 5328 and type REGISTER. Both guide you through a simple 2-minute setup — business name, services, location, and contact details. Your listing goes live immediately after completing registration.
Konnet Pro is our highest visibility plan. Businesses on Konnet Pro appear first in every relevant search — above Verified and free listings. For ₦10,000/month, your business gets a gold 🏆 Konnet Pro badge, priority placement in searches, and visibility across all 36 states for maximum reach nationwide.
Konnet Hub is live on both Telegram (@Konnet_Bot) and WhatsApp (+234 810 417 5328). Both platforms offer the same full experience — AI search, business registration, subscription plans, and payment processing. Use whichever platform you prefer.
Type /plans on Telegram or PLANS on WhatsApp. Select your plan, enter your email, and choose your payment method — card or bank transfer. Paystack generates a secure payment link instantly. Your listing activates automatically the moment payment is confirmed.
